title: campylospermum affine
intro: Campylospermum affine is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Ochnaceae, and is also known as the 'African staff tree'. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Campylospermum affine include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve drying and crushing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or used in topical applications.
